gates.name: Parallel Workstreams Scope Validation
gates.description: Validate parallel workstreams configuration against schema
gates.success_criteria: Configuration passes JSON schema validation and dependency checks

gates.name: Write Manifest Validation
gates.success_criteria: All manifests exist and pass schema validation

gates.name: Conflict Graph Build
gates.description: Build conflict graph from write manifests
gates.success_criteria: Conflict graph built successfully with all edges identified

gates.name: Parallel Group Authorization
gates.description: Authorize parallel execution groups against constraints

gates.name: Worktree Provisioning
gates.description: Provision isolated git worktrees for each workstream
gates.success_criteria: All worktrees created successfully and isolated

gates.name: Declared Write Enforcement
gates.description: Verify actual writes match declared writes

gates.name: Evidence Bundle Validation
gates.description: Collect and validate workstream evidence bundle
gates.success_criteria: Evidence bundle passes schema validation with valid SHA-256 hashes

gates.name: Patch Integration
gates.success_criteria: All patches apply cleanly in order

gates.name: Determinism Validation
gates.description: Verify conflict graph computation is deterministic
gates.success_criteria: Multiple runs produce identical normalized hashes

gates.name: Registry Reconciliation
gates.success_criteria: All artifacts cataloged in registry with provenance
